snapshots.notes: Equity, Fixed Income, and Exchange Traded Certificates percentages are from the Schedule of Investments. Cash percentage is derived from net cash and cash equivalents from the Statement of Financial Position. Other percentage includes Closed-ended funds, net derivatives, other current assets/liabilities, and an uncategorized portion of transferable securities to sum to 100%.

Percentages for Equity, Fixed Income, Closed-ended funds, and Exchange Traded Certificates are explicitly stated for 2024. Cash and other residual assets/liabilities are not available for 2024, so the sum does not approximate 100%.

extraction_notes: Percentages for 2025 are derived to sum to 100% by including net cash, net derivatives, other current assets/liabilities, and an uncategorized portion of transferable securities in 'other_pct'. For 2024, only explicitly stated percentages are provided, so the sum does not approximate 100%.
